post.content:
Sharing my experience for the community benefit:

Was contacted by recruiter for OA.
OA was 90 min as far as I remember with 4 questions ranging from easy, medium and hard. Can't recall the questions - each question had 300 points. Total - 1200 points.

Post this Phone Screen was scheduled.
Phone screen question - Given a n x n matrix with 0s and 1s, given the min number of swaps (not necessary to be adjacent) required to created a y x y (y<=n) matrix of 1s inside.

Onsite:
1st Round DSA: https://leetcode.com/problems/alien-dictionary/description/
2nd Round LLD: Create a Cache, had to do some operations, all needed to be O(1) TC.
3rd Round HLD: Stock Broker System related design

EDIT: Also had HM round as well - standard behavioural questions/past projects discussion.

Verdict: Converted:)

Phone screen - Slide y*y window matrix throughout the matrix, find number of 0s(from the sum of window), check if enough 1s outside of this window(sum of entrie matrix - sum of this window) to swap all 0s, if possible update swaps.
Sometimes OA is for 70mins, with 4 problems in increasing order of difficulty.
how many question needed to be done in OA to get eligible for next round ?
Congrats on the offer OP, what language you used for LLD, is different from DSA rounds?
Create a Cache, had to do some operations, all needed to be O(1) TC. ---> Is it similar to All-O-One data structure?
how did you solve phone screen problem?
can u share what operations need to be done in LLD?
What is the time complexity of your solution in Phone Screen ?
Hey, I have upcoming interviews for uber? can we connect?\n
Please share YOE and was 1st DSA round happened on Coding Pair, all Test cases need to be passed or just to write the production ready code?
How did you prepare for such a variety of questions?... DSA is given, but LLD AND HLD too?
Onsite happened virtually or in person?
What was the HLD question? Design the whole stock broker or some watchlist implementation?
